kb_entries.title: Standard Password Reset Procedure
kb_entries.problem_description: User locked out after failed login attempts.
kb_entries.solution:
1. Verify employee ID in HR system
2. Open Admin Portal > User Management
3. Search user > Click 'Reset Password'
4. Generate temporary password and email to user
5. Instruct user to change password on first login

kb_entries.title: Standard Software Installation via SCCM
kb_entries.problem_description: User requires software installed on corporate device.
kb_entries.solution:
1. Check license availability in license portal
2. Verify user's VLAN/network segment allows the software
3. Push install via SCCM > Applications > Deploy
4. Verify installation completed via SCCM monitoring
5. Notify user and confirm functionality

kb_entries.title: Solution for Bizarre: all printers on floor 2 printing gibberis
kb_entries.problem_description:
Something very strange is happening. Every printer on floor 2 started printing pages of random symbols and unicode characters about 20 minutes ago. No one sent these print jobs.

We've tried power cyc
kb_entries.solution: Root cause: Bizarre: all printers on floor 2 printing gibberish characters. Resolution steps: 1. Diagnosed the issue. 2. Applied the fix. 3. Verified resolution. Workaround: Follow standard procedure. This solution was resolved and documented for future reference.
